content.text:
Build is green (warnings only, no errors).

**Report:**

- **File modified:** `crates/lua-stdlib/src/state_stub.rs`, added a new impl method at lines 313–315 (the end of the `impl LuaStateStubExt for LuaState` block).
- **What `to_boolean` does now:** Delegates to the existing canonical free function `lua_vm::api::to_boolean(self, idx)`, which returns `!matches!(o, LuaValue::Nil | LuaValue::Bool(false))` — i.e., faithful to C-Lua `lua_toboolean` / `!l_isfalse(o)` semantics. Falls through `lua_vm::api::index_to_value` so out-of-range / `LUA_TNONE` indices correctly read as nil → false.
- **Inner todo!() calls:** None — the delegation chain (`api::to_boolean` → `index_to_value` → enum match) is fully implemented; no new panics introduced.
- **`cargo build -p lua-cli`:** Green (184 pre-existing warnings, 0 errors, `Finished dev profile`).

result:
Build is green (warnings only, no errors).

**Report:**

- **File modified:** `crates/lua-stdlib/src/state_stub.rs`, added a new impl method at lines 313–315 (the end of the `impl LuaStateStubExt for LuaState` block).
- **What `to_boolean` does now:** Delegates to the existing canonical free function `lua_vm::api::to_boolean(self, idx)`, which returns `!matches!(o, LuaValue::Nil | LuaValue::Bool(false))` — i.e., faithful to C-Lua `lua_toboolean` / `!l_isfalse(o)` semantics. Falls through `lua_vm::api::index_to_value` so out-of-range / `LUA_TNONE` indices correctly read as nil → false.
- **Inner todo!() calls:** None — the delegation chain (`api::to_boolean` → `index_to_value` → enum match) is fully implemented; no new panics introduced.
- **`cargo build -p lua-cli`:** Green (184 pre-existing warnings, 0 errors, `Finished dev profile`).
